name: GPT-3
training_approach: unsupervised pretraining on 300B tokens from filtered Common Crawl, WebText2, Books, Wikipedia
lineage_path: McCulloch-Pitts neuron -> Perceptron -> MLP -> RNN -> LSTM -> Seq2Seq -> Transformer -> GPT-1 -> GPT-2 -> GPT-3
summary: GPT-3 proved that scaling a decoder-only transformer to 175B parameters produced emergent few-shot learning abilities, allowing the model to perform tasks from just a few examples in the prompt. It launched the API-as-a-product model for LLMs, catalyzed the scaling laws hypothesis, and made large language models accessible to developers worldwide, fundamentally shifting the AI industry toward foundation models.
